text: Compressive strain is necessary but not sufficient — all ambient-pressure SC films use SrLaAlO₄ (a=3.756Å, -2.0%). Tensile-strained films on NdGaO₃/SrTiO₃ only superconduct under additional high pressure.

Growth method is a leading variable in the current dataset — GAE (extreme non-equilibrium, in-situ oxidation) produced 63K onset on the same substrate where PLD+anneal gives 42K. This is a large same-substrate synthesis effect, but still a single comparison that needs replication.

Oxygen vacancies are the zero-R bottleneck, but they sit in DIFFERENT sites in films vs. bulk — compressive strain pushes vacancies from apical O to planar NiO₂ sites (Nat. Mater. 2025). This changes which O sites matter for film optimization.

Superconducting dome exists (PRL 2026) — Tc stable for Sr doping x=0 to 0.21, suppressed near x≈0.38. Hall coefficient sign change near optimal doping resembles electron-doped cuprate phenomenology without proving the same mechanism.
Strange-metal α~1 correlates with highest Tc (63K sample), while lower-Tc samples show Fermi-liquid α~2. This links SC strength to non-Fermi-liquid normal state, paralleling cuprates.

γII Fermi pocket is a reported SC-associated signature — present in reported SC superstructures (1212, 2222, 2323), absent in non-SC 1313 (Nature, Apr 9, 2026). Treat it as a screening clue to verify against the original figures.

Film + moderate pressure may stack constructively — (La,Pr)₃Ni₂O₇ films on SLAO reach 68.5K onset at just 2 GPa in the cited pressure series (arXiv:2603.29531, Mar 2026). Re-check the source before using the pressure sensitivity as a projection.

c/a ratio is a leading empirical parameter within the measured substrate/pressure series — onset Tc increases with c/a ratio (Commun. Phys. 2025). Extrapolating beyond the measured c/a range is the risky step.

RPA calculations predict compressive strain flips pairing symmetry from s± (bulk) to d-wave (film) via substrate-induced hole doping. If confirmed, this means films and bulk use DIFFERENT pairing mechanisms to achieve SC.
No films on substrates with a < 3.75Å — SmAlO₃ (3.734), EuAlO₃ (3.720), YAlO₃ (3.680) untested. Could push c/a higher.
Sr-doping × substrate matrix unexplored — the dome is only mapped on SLAO. Does optimal doping shift on different substrates?
Electric field gating proposed (Nat. Commun. Jan 2026) to reach 77K+ — zero experimental attempts published as of April 2026.
No lanthanide sweep beyond Pr — Nd, Sm, Gd substitution on La site could reveal chemical pressure trends.
Pairing symmetry unconfirmed experimentally in films — s± vs d-wave has major implications for which optimizations matter.
Film + pressure explored by only 2 groups — systematic pressure studies on GAE-grown 63K films do not yet exist.
